goal: Get the status of your existing return on O1016.
success_criteria: Agent reports label_sent (initiated 2026-06-29), explains ship-back next step and 5-10 day refund after warehouse receipt.

customer_msg: Hi, could you check what's happening with my return for order O1016? grace.liu@example.com.
agent_msg:
Hi Grace,

Your return for order O1016 is currently at the "label sent" stage. This means that the return shipping label has been sent to your email. Please use this label to ship the item back to us. Once we receive the returned item, we'll process your refund. If you have any further questions, feel free to ask!
